title: Speedrun F3
description: A completely free, minimalist F3 screen for speedrunners. Hides screen clutter and highlights essential data like E-count, precise angles, and coordinates.
body:
# Speedrun F3

**Speedrun F3** is a completely free, client-side Fabric mod built specifically for Minecraft speedrunners. It completely revamps the vanilla F3 debug screen, stripping away all the unnecessary performance stats and technical clutter, and leaving you with a clean, minimalist HUD that provides exactly what you need to achieve your next Personal Best.

## 🚀 Key Features

* **Minimalist & Clean Interface:** Features a slim, shadowed font with a transparent background that stays out of your way, ensuring maximum visibility during intense runs.
* **Entity Radar (E-Count):** Keep track of the Entity count (Rendered / Total) to easily spot hidden Bastions and Nether Fortresses through walls.
* **Precise Facing & Angles:** Displays your exact facing direction and angles, perfect for accurate Stronghold triangulation and Eye of Ender tracking.
* **Smart Coordinates & Portal Calculator:** Shows your exact XYZ coordinates and includes a built-in Overworld-to-Nether coordinate converter (automatically divides X and Z by 8) for lightning-fast blind travel.
* **Structure Navigation:** Pinpoint your location with clean Biome and Chunk boundaries, helping you locate structures without getting distracted by irrelevant block data.

## ⚙️ Compatibility
This mod is **Client-side only**. You can install it on your client and use it freely on any vanilla multiplayer server or realm without the server needing to have it installed. 

---
*Declutter your screen and focus on the run!*
